# PdfPix

> PdfPix is a browser-based PDF toolkit focused on privacy-first workflows. The product helps users merge, split, compress, convert, edit, secure, and organize PDF files without uploading documents to a server.

## Primary intent
- Offer direct, task-oriented PDF utilities with minimal friction.
- Emphasize local processing, no account requirement, and broad browser compatibility.
- Serve users looking for document conversion, editing, protection, and optimization workflows.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/): Main product overview and category navigation
- [About](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/about/): Company background and mission
- [Blog](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/blog/): Editorial hub for guides, trends, founder content, and ecosystem articles
- [Founder](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/founder/): Founder profile and credibility signals
- [Pricing](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pricing/): Product access and support positioning
- [Privacy](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/privacy/): Privacy commitments and local-processing explanation
- [Terms](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/terms/): Terms of service
- [Contact](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/contact/): Support contact details

## Major tool categories
- Organize PDF
- Optimize PDF
- Convert to PDF
- Convert from PDF
- Edit PDF
- PDF Security
- PDF Intelligence

## High-priority tool URLs
- [Merge PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/merge-pdf/): Combine multiple PDF files into one document
- [Split PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/split-pdf/): Separate pages or custom page ranges
- [Compress PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/compress-pdf/): Reduce file size while preserving quality
- [PDF to Word](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pdf-to-word/): Convert PDFs into editable Word documents
- [Word to PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/word-to-pdf/): Convert Word documents into PDFs
- [PDF to PowerPoint](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pdf-to-powerpoint/): Convert PDF slides into editable presentations
- [PowerPoint to PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/powerpoint-to-pdf/): Export presentations to PDF
- [PDF to Excel](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pdf-to-excel/): Extract spreadsheet-ready data
- [Excel to PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/excel-to-pdf/): Export spreadsheets to PDF
- [PDF to JPG](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/pdf-to-jpg/): Turn PDF pages into images
- [JPG to PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/jpg-to-pdf/): Create PDFs from images
- [OCR PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/ocr-pdf/): Make scanned PDFs searchable
- [Protect PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/protect-pdf/): Add password protection
- [Unlock PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/unlock-pdf/): Remove password protection from accessible PDFs
- [Redact PDF](https://pdfpix.uthakkan.in/redact-pdf/): Permanently hide sensitive content

## Product characteristics
- Privacy-first browser processing
- Free access to core tools
- No forced registration for common tasks
- Multi-tool internal linking across related workflows
- Designed for desktop and mobile browsers
